item.description:
Fabrizio Romano @FabrizioRomano · 5min Erling Haaland: “Bernardo Cannavaro Silva… Man of the Match!”.
“I remember there was a cross, I told him after when he headed it out: 'You were like f*cking Fabio Cannavaro!'”.
“Come on, we've all been swearing in all lives. Bernie, I'm not going to make it emotional but Mostrar más 198 151 1 mil 43 mil
